summary: A solid audience recording that captures a good night where the band is playing strong.
review: Both reviewers praise this tape, noting it sounds much clearer than the comparable soundboard source and that the band delivers a solid performance. The audience‑recorded (AUD) capture is described as sweet and enjoyable, earning a four‑star rating for the recording while the show itself receives five stars.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers give high marks to the performance (5/5) and a good rating to the recording (4/5); weighted average yields ~4.3 stars, but only two reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as clearer and sweeter than the SNDBD source; no major flaws mentioned, just praised for its fidelity compared to typical audience tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the band is playing well overall.
